name: io.github.fastslack/e2e-runner
description: JSON-driven E2E test runner with parallel Chrome pool execution and 16 MCP tools.

tools.name: e2e_run
tools.description: Run E2E browser tests. Specify all suites, a specific suite, or a JSON file path. Returns structured results with pass/fail status, duration, screenshots, network summary, and stability insights.

tools.name: e2e_list
tools.description: List all available E2E test suites with their test names and counts.

tools.name: e2e_create_test
tools.description: Create a new E2E test JSON file with 28+ built-in action types: click, type, assert, navigate, wait, evaluate, visual verification, and more. Supports hooks, retries, serial mode, and module composition.

tools.name: e2e_create_module
tools.description: Create reusable test modules with parameterized actions. Modules encapsulate repeated sequences (auth flows, navigation, form fills) and compose via $use references with mustache-style parameters.

tools.name: e2e_pool_status
tools.description: Get Chrome pool availability, running sessions, queue depth, and capacity across all configured pools.

tools.name: e2e_screenshot
tools.description: Retrieve a screenshot by its content hash (ss:HASH). Returns the image for visual inspection of test results or error states.

tools.name: e2e_capture
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of any URL on demand. Supports full-page capture, CSS selector waits, custom delays, auth token injection, and SPA-aware navigation strategies.

tools.name: e2e_analyze
tools.description: Analyze a page's structure and return all interactive elements (forms, buttons, links, tables, modals) with CSS selectors plus suggested test scaffolds. Replaces the screenshot-guess-retry cycle.

tools.name: e2e_issue
tools.description: Fetch a GitHub/GitLab issue and generate E2E or API tests. Supports prompt mode (returns test prompt) and verify mode (auto-generates tests via Claude API, runs them, and reports results).

tools.name: e2e_learnings
tools.description: Query stability insights built across runs: flaky tests, selector health, page reliability, API health, error patterns, and 7-day trends. Drill down by test name, page, or selector.

tools.name: e2e_network_logs
tools.description: Query network request/response logs for a specific test run. Filter by HTTP method, status code, URL pattern, or errors only. Optionally include headers and bodies for deep debugging.

tools.name: e2e_vars
tools.description: Manage project variables stored in SQLite. Variables are referenced in test JSON as {{var.KEY}} with project-wide or per-suite scoping. Supports set, get, list, and delete operations.

tools.name: e2e_dashboard_start
tools.description: Start the real-time web dashboard with live test execution, results history, screenshot gallery, pool visualization, and WebSocket updates.

tools.name: e2e_dashboard_stop
tools.description: Stop the E2E Runner web dashboard.

tools.name: e2e_dashboard_restart
tools.description: Restart the web dashboard, optionally with a new project directory or port. Useful when switching projects or recovering from stale sessions.

tools.name: e2e_neo4j
tools.description: Manage the Neo4j knowledge graph container for advanced E2E learnings visualization and cross-project analysis. Supports start, stop, and status actions.
